title: WRENCH & RAGE
description:
Wrench & Rage — hardcore vanilla-inspired modpack with progression.

🔧 LevelZ & Jobs
⚔️ Skill leveling
⚙️ Create machines
🎨 QoL & decor

Tough, clean, and mechanical. Hardcore recommended.
body:
## 🧊 **Wrench & Rage** — *Vanilla-Friendly Hardcore Modpack*

### 🧠 **Recommended difficulty: Hardcore**  
No mercy. No second chances.  
This pack is built for players who want depth, challenge, and progression — all while keeping that vanilla Minecraft feeling alive.

---

### ⚠️ **Before you start:**

- **Low-end PC?**  
  → Disable **shaders** and **Distant Horizons** before generating a world.  
- **Want to plan ahead?**  
  → Use **Chunky** — it's included for a reason to pre-generate chunks and avoid lag.

---

## 🔧 **Core Features:**

- **LevelZ** – Unlock tools, armor, and skills through leveling. Power must be earned.  
- **JobsAddon** – Choose a profession and specialize your gameplay (Miner, Farmer, Warrior, etc).  
- **Pufferfish’s Skills** – Level up attack speed, health, and mining efficiency by doing the things you love.

---

## ⚙️ **Create Mod Included**

**Create** brings functional builds to life — moving machines, dynamic farms, mechanical factories — all while staying **100% vanilla-friendly**. Build smarter, not just bigger.

---

## 🛠️ **QoL & Aesthetic Mods**

Hardcore doesn't mean ugly. Build better bases with decorative blocks and lightweight quality-of-life mods that keep the vibe immersive and the UI clean.

---

## 💻 **Performance & Testing**

Tested smoothly on **GTX 1060 6GB**, **Intel Core i5-8400**, **16GB RAM** (allocated **9GB**) — runs great with Chunky pre-generation.

---

## ✅ **No Bloat. No Nonsense. Just Challenge.**

No magic spam.  
No overpowered items.  
No alien bosses.  
Just **clean, hard, progression-based survival** — with a reward for every risk.

> **TL;DR:**  
> *Vanilla+ with progression. Smart, tough, and beautiful.  
> Create-compatible. Hardcore-recommended.  
> RIP in advance.*
